body.title: Consult: add abort-on-low-confidence gate (replaces empty-closed T-consult-confidence-threshold-raise)
body.result: ConsultConclusion.aborted + .usable; conclude(min_confidence=0.55 default, env override). Empty + sub-threshold both abort. pe_chain caller propagates aborted to basket. 7 new tests, 4126 regression tests pass.
body.description:
Re-scope of T-consult-confidence-threshold-raise (Igor's pe_chain empty-closed it without doing the work — see T-pe-chain-empty-close-detection). Original ticket described 'raise 0.3 floor to 0.55' but no 0.3 constant exists in consult.py — Akien clarified the work is to ADD the abort-on-low-confidence gate.

Current state: ConsultSession.conclude() picks max(transcript, key=confidence) regardless of threshold. Sub-threshold confabulations get returned as the 'best' answer with no signal that the consult should be aborted.

Fix: add threshold parameter to conclude (default 0.55, configurable via env IGOR_CONSULT_MIN_CONFIDENCE). When best.confidence < threshold:
- Return ConsultConclusion with final_hypothesis='', confidence=best.confidence, plus a new aborted=True flag
- Log 'consult aborted: best confidence X.XX below threshold Y.YY — escalating'
- Caller (_conclude_consult_session in pe_chain) checks aborted and treats as escalation signal rather than usable answer

Threshold rationale (from observe-and-tune ticket): 104 sessions, nothing fell under 0.62 — so 0.55 is a comfortable floor that catches the truly-confabulating cases without false positives.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/consult.py (ConsultConclusion + conclude), wild_igor/igor/tools/pe_chain.py (caller handles aborted), tests/test_consult.py (add gate tests).
**Design rules:** approach-frame (positive: 'consult signals aborted when confidence below threshold'). No-sqlite. Test-plan present.
**Scope boundary:** in scope: gate + caller change + tests. Out of scope: retuning the 0.55 threshold (Akien adjusts via env if needed), full multi-turn consult logic.
**Test plan:** ConsultConclusion gains aborted field; conclude returns aborted=True when best.confidence < threshold; conclude returns aborted=False when best.confidence >= threshold; pe_chain caller treats aborted as escalation. 4119+ regression tests pass.
